issues.title: Typo in table name
issues.problem: The table name 'stufdents' is incorrect. It should be 'sigma_analytics.fact_transactions'.

issues.title: Incorrect logic for revenue calculation
issues.problem: The query does not filter transactions by status 'COMPLETED' to calculate revenue.
issues.fix: SELECT SUM(amount) AS revenue FROM sigma_analytics.fact_transactions WHERE status = 'COMPLETED';

issues.title: Incorrect logic for failure rate calculation
issues.problem: The query does not calculate the failure rate correctly.
issues.fix: SELECT (COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'FAILED' THEN 1 END) / COUNT(*)) * 100 AS failure_rate FROM sigma_analytics.fact_transactions;

issues.title: Lack of comments
issues.problem: The query lacks comments explaining its purpose and logic.
issues.fix:
-- Fetch the first 4 records from the fact_transactions table
SELECT * FROM sigma_analytics.fact_transactions LIMIT 4;

review.summary: The query contains a typo in the table name and lacks proper logic for revenue and failure rate calculations. Comments have been added for readability.
